offsetMeasurement.detail: Market was closed (weekend) when this was measured, so the live tick (/tick/EURUSDm) was stale and unsuitable for the usual tick-vs-Date.now() method. Instead: ALL 738 D1 candles in the frozen D1 file have epoch time % 86400 == 0 (exact UTC midnight), and ALL 8952 H1 candles in the frozen H1 file have epoch time % 3600 == 0 (exact UTC hour boundary). This is only possible if the broker server clock offset from UTC is 0 (a non-zero offset would shift bar-open epochs off the UTC boundary unless the offset were itself an exact multiple of 24h, which is not a real clock-offset scenario). Re-verify with the live tick method (fetchBrokerOffsetSeconds) once the market is open if more confidence is desired.
